div.p: The system utilizes a fail-fast mechanism to maintain low p99 latency.

ul.li: Liveliness: The HTTPHandler remains responsive to new connections while the event loop handles background batching.
Backpressure: Prevents TCP Bufferbloat by rejecting at the application layer before enqueuing.
Resource Efficiency: GPU utilization is maximized by using the DynamicBatcher to saturate SM cores.

g.text: Red Paths = Backpressure rejection / Load shedding
